name: IRC_AGENCIES
description: The IRC_AGENCIES will store the external Agency information.

columns.Name: AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: AGENCY_NAME
columns.Comments: Column to store Name for Agency.

columns.Name: AGENCY_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Stores Email contact of the Agency.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the Agency as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_AGENCY_STATUS.

columns.Name: AGENCY_CONTACT
columns.Comments: Stores contact details of the Agency.

columns.Name: AGENCY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of the Agency as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_AGENCY_TYPE.

columns.Name: CONTRACT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the contact type of the Agency as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_AG_CONTRACT_TYPE.

columns.Name: AGENCY_NOTES
columns.Comments: Stores additional notes for the Agency.

columns.Name: EMBARGO_PERIOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Embargo Period of the Agency as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_EMBARGO_PERIOD.

columns.Name: INACTIVATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores inactivation date of the Agency.

columns.Name: DELETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores deletion date of the Agency.

columns.Name: CREATE_JA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to determine if the Agent can create a Job application for Candidate.

columns.Name: CAND_INTERNAL_SEARCH_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to determine if the Agent can search for the internal candidates.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
